name: Morgan
message: When the intrusive thought to chew the Polly pocket clothes becomes too strong

name: Mari
message: Just found you on IG. I look forward to following your journey. Wishing you a safe trek. 🏕️

name: Mom
message: I am not loving this bear thing, cute as it looks…

name: Pablo
message: You are way braver than you dad

name: Brooke
message: Just saw your journey on IG! I think this is amazing. Sending you lots of love & prayers for a safe journey, all the way from Hawai’i! 🤙🏾
